candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line; matches Total Revenue exactly in values and is the more specific operating revenue label.
Also a valid top-line revenue label, but appears to be a duplicate total of Net Sales with identical values.
COGS, not revenue.
Non-operating gain, not core revenue.

variables.notes: Use Net Sales first as the preferred revenue line; Total Revenue is included as a fallback label for possible reporting variation.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line; best match for cost of sales.
Also a direct COGS label, but values duplicate Cost of goods sold exactly, so it is likely an alternate label.
Component of COGS, not the full COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: A D&A component within COGS, not total COGS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: A D&A component within COGS, not total COGS.

candidates.row_label: Impairment in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: An impairment component within COGS, not total COGS.

variables.notes: Use the direct total COGS line first; alternate duplicate label included as fallback.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component and populated.
Clear SG&A overhead component and populated.
Can contain overhead/operating expenses, but broader and potentially mixed; use only because no explicit single SG&A total exists.
Subcomponent of Selling expenses; prefer parent component row over nested subcomponent to avoid overlap/double counting.
Depreciation should be excluded from SG&A components for PROF.
Personnel costs are overhead-related, but likely span production and non-SG&A functions, so not preferred when clearer SG&A rows exist.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A total row is present. Selected best overhead buckets while excluding D&A and avoiding nested subcomponents like Other Selling expenses to reduce double counting.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; best match.
Looks like an unpopulated/header-style row, not the primary reported expense line.
Amortization/product-related line, not the main R&D expense.
Balance sheet amortization account, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset gross carrying amount, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Explicit R&D expense exists; included alternate label as fallback in case naming changes across years.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line; best match.
Would be broader than interest expense and appears unpopulated/header-like here; only fallback if interest expense missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest subcomponent, not preferred over total interest expense.
Label exists but appears unpopulated/header-like; weaker fallback than explicit populated Interest expense row.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental subcomponent, not preferred over total interest expense.

variables.notes: Use direct interest expense first. Financial expenses is included only as a fallback broader finance-cost label if the direct line is unavailable in some periods.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of AB SKF
candidates.why: Best book equity line because it excludes non-controlling interests, consistent with BE rule.
Includes minority interest, so not preferred for BE when separate NCI line exists.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to non-controlling interests Non-current liabilities
candidates.why: This is minority interest/NCI, not BE.
Balancing item, not an actual reported equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not BE.
Income statement item, not balance sheet equity.
Income statement/equity-accounting item, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of AB SKF

variables.notes: Preferred parent/shareholder equity line excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct minority interest / non-controlling interest balance sheet line; best match.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to non-controlling interests Non-current liabilities
candidates.why: Also a direct NCI line; semantically precise though oddly suffixed in label.
Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
Includes total equity plus minority interest, not pure MIB.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to non-controlling interests Non-current liabilities

variables.notes: Included both balance sheet NCI labels as priority alternatives; they appear to represent the same concept under different naming conventions.
